nodes.label: Black-White differences in intergenerational mobility in the US: evidence from heterogeneous sibling correlations
Bayesian hierarchical sibling-correlation model with "organized dispersion"
nodes.rationale: Develops Bayesian hierarchical linear models with 'organized dispersion' to explicitly model heterogeneity in sibling correlations, allowing separate estimation of whether Black-White differences arise from differing effects of family background or differing within-family heterogeneity.
